mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT DEPLOY_SYS_CD AS deploySysCd ,DEPLOY_SYS_NM AS deploySysNm ,DEPLOY_SYS_URL AS deploySysUrl ,DEPLOY_SYS_DESC AS deploySysDesc ,DEPLOY_SYS_GRP_CD AS deploySysGrpCd ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBDEPOLYSYSBS WHERE 1=1
AND DEPLOY_SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPLOY_SYS_NM like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPLOY_SYS_URL like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysUrl, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPLOY_SYS_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPLOY_SYS_GRP_CD like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysGrpCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by DEPLOY_SYS_CD ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBDEPOLYSYSBS WHERE 1=1
AND DEPLOY_SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPLOY_SYS_NM like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPLOY_SYS_URL like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysUrl, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPLOY_SYS_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DEPLOY_SYS_GRP_CD like CONCAT('%',#{deploySysGrpCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT DEPLOY_SYS_CD AS deploySysCd ,DEPLOY_SYS_NM AS deploySysNm ,DEPLOY_SYS_URL AS deploySysUrl ,DEPLOY_SYS_DESC AS deploySysDesc ,DEPLOY_SYS_GRP_CD AS deploySysGrpCd FROM TBDEPOLYSYSBS WHERE DEPLOY_SYS_CD = #{deploySysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBDEPOLYSYSBS WHERE DEPLOY_SYS_CD = #{deploySysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
